text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-4th:2An is the 13th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The kanji for 2 in Japanese (二) can be read as "fu", which makes the title a homophone of "fu-an", Japanese for "anxiety".

Musical motifs

The track has 1 remix: AoTs3-PF1.
